---
name: "Feature request"
about: Suggest an improvement aligned with Satoshi Dashboard architecture
title: "[Feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Summary

Describe the feature request in a short paragraph.

## Problem

What user or technical problem does this solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe behavior, flow, and acceptance criteria.

## Scope

- Module(s) affected:
- API/backend impact: [none | low | medium | high]
- Breaking changes expected: [yes/no]

## Data & Source Policy

- Does this require a new data source? [yes/no]
- If yes, justify why existing sources are insufficient.

## Architecture Notes (required for backend/API changes)

- Must follow `.claude/BACKEND_API_RULES.md`.
- Keep endpoint contracts backward-compatible.
- Keep Vercel/serverless compatibility.

## Alternatives Considered

List alternatives you considered and why they were rejected.

## Additional Context

Attach references, mockups, docs, or examples.
